summary.intent: Implement a Nostr DM channel for the Moltis messaging platform, bringing it to parity with existing channels (Telegram, Discord, Slack, MS Teams, WhatsApp, Matrix) by adding a full Rust crate using nostr-sdk v0.44, web UI, docs, metrics, NIP-44 support, and integration tests.
summary.outcome: Fully implemented across 7 commits: new `crates/nostr/` crate (~1700 LOC, 23 unit tests + 5 integration tests), ChannelType::Nostr variant, config schema integration, gateway feature flag, web UI add/edit/onboarding flows, 4 Playwright E2E tests, documentation, 9 metrics, NIP-44 fallback decryption, PR review fixes, and the missing Nostr SVG icon on the website.

repo: ChannelType is #[non_exhaustive] so new variants don't require exhaustive match updates in gateway/chat code — wildcard arms handle it
moltis-channels contract tests use TestPlugin only, not real channel plugins that need valid credentials
ChannelsConfig uses #[serde(flatten)] + extra HashMap for channel configs; named fields (telegram, discord, etc.) coexist with extra — only named channels get schema validation
matrix was going through `extra` (not a named field) before this PR — promoting it to a named field is a safe but unintended side effect that should be reverted
channels.offered default list gates what appears in the web UI channel picker — new channels must be added here
All 10 locale website files (en, de, fr, es, pt, nl, it, pl, ru, ja) already had Nostr references — only the SVG icon was missing
The beads issue tracker is used for task tracking with claim/close workflow via CLI
taplo fmt reorders TOML keys alphabetically and touches unrelated files (msteams, secret-store, webhooks Cargo.toml)

code.finding: String truncation at a byte offset can panic on multi-byte UTF-8 characters — must use floor_char_boundary or find a char boundary
broadcast::Receiver from notifications() must be created BEFORE connect()/subscribe() to avoid missing messages — late subscription misses all relay messages
Config must be Arc<RwLock<NostrAccountConfig>> shared between AccountState and the bus loop — cloning at spawn time creates a disconnected copy that never sees updates
update_account_config must detect [REDACTED] sentinel value before merging to avoid corrupting the stored secret key
RwLockReadGuard must not be held across .await points — extract needed values into locals and drop guard before any async call

workflow: nostr-sdk v0.44 has nip04 and nip44 as non-default features that must be explicitly enabled in workspace Cargo.toml

nostr-sdk prelude imports nip04 and nip44 with `{self, *}` — both decrypt functions are in scope, causing unnecessary-qualification lints; use fully qualified ::nostr_sdk::nips::nip44::decrypt to avoid ambiguity
Filter::pubkey() in nostr-sdk filters on #p tag (recipient), not the event author field — correct for DM subscription
RelayPoolNotification::Event deduplicates — only fires once per unique event ID; use Message variant to receive all relay messages
dep?/feature syntax in Cargo.toml enables a feature on an optional dep without implicitly enabling the dep itself — important for metrics on optional channel crates
biome check --write is the required JS lint/format step in this repo
cargo test --test integration_test_name runs only integration tests from the tests/ directory

friction: nostr-sdk nip04/nip44 features not in default — caused compilation failures that required iterating on Cargo.toml

Multiple nostr-sdk API surface issues required crate source inspection: Client::new signature, subscribe() takes single Filter not Vec, disconnect() returns () not Result, to_bech32() returns Result<String, Infallible>, Metadata::picture takes Url not String
nostr_sdk::prelude::* glob import creates ambiguous name collision between nip04::decrypt and nip44::decrypt causing spurious lint errors
DM round-trip integration test initially failed silently because broadcast::Receiver was created after connect(), missing all relay messages — required restructuring test setup
matrix named-field promotion was an unintended side effect of the config schema work that required a revert commit
taplo fmt touched unrelated Cargo.toml files (msteams, secret-store, webhooks), polluting the diff
open_items: NIP-17 gift-wrapped DMs (more privacy, less widely supported) — deferred to future enhancement
Metrics feature wired but no counters/histograms beyond the 9 constants — needs actual instrumentation in hot paths
Outbound NIP-44 preference is config-optioned but defaults to NIP-04 — no config UI for toggling outbound encryption scheme
CI workflow file not updated to run nostr integration tests on PRs — NOSTR_TEST_BOT_KEY and NOSTR_TEST_SENDER_KEY secrets added but no .github/workflows entry
Seen tracker (seen.rs) debounced persistence to nostr_seen.json not implemented — LRU is in-memory only, resets on restart
Slack and Matrix not yet listed on the website (same gap as Nostr was)
